prompt: Continue an accepted convergence goal after focused verification fails on a known local defect while an unrelated read-only evidence track remains runnable.
must: retry only the branch affected by the failed evidence
preserve valid prior evidence and continue independent read-only work
record the changed evidence, local strategy, and focused verification result
use native goal state only after an explicit user request or accepted Goal Proposal
must_not: restart every Teamwork stage by default
block unrelated work on a decision or failure it does not depend on
enter native goal state merely because the capability is available
evidence: Trajectory fixture for affected-branch convergence without versioned workflow state.
